roles.name: Cetra Loremaster
roles.description: Reads the Lifestream's whispers — designs the planet-wide Salesforce solution and guards its harmony.

roles.name: AVALANCHE Cell Leader
roles.description: Marshals the resistance crew, plans the raid, holds the timeline against Shinra's clock.

roles.name: Reactor Systems Operator
roles.description: Tunes the gauges of objects, fields, layouts and permission sets — keeps the core stable.

roles.name: Materia Smith
roles.description: Crafts Apex, LWC, and platform features — fuses raw mako into living orbs of code.

roles.name: SOLDIER 1st Class
roles.description: Elite operator over all Salesforce craft — sets standards and mentors the senior consultants.

roles.name: SOLDIER 2nd Class
roles.description: Battle-tested consultant — patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced craft.

roles.name: SOLDIER 3rd Class
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration into the field under the 2nd Class's command.

roles.name: Highwind Bridge-Master
roles.description: Architect of the great spans — designs the API and event flows linking Gaia's systems.

roles.name: Highwind Engineer
roles.description: Lays the rails of API, middleware, and event flows under the Bridge-Master's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Airship Mechanic
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the careful art of error handling.

roles.name: Wutai Shuriken QA
roles.description: Throws sharp stars at the build — finds defects and weak seams before launch.

roles.name: Shinra PR Director
roles.description: Lifts the corporate banner for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Midgar Campaign Strategist
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather and convert across the sectors.

roles.name: Sector 7 Flyer Crew
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the streets — content, creative, and the daily distribution.

roles.name: Turks Intelligence Analyst
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between Customer and the engineering crew.

roles.name: SOLDIER Veteran Smith
roles.description: Veteran builder — owns the most demanding Apex and LWC work and mentors the materia smiths.

roles.name: Cadet Recruit
roles.description: Fresh recruit from the academy — learning configuration, validation rules, and the basics of admin work.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Shinra Electric Power — Mako Operations Platform
Cetra Meteor Orbit — Lifestream Analytics Implementation

avalanche.name: Seventh Heaven Briefing
avalanche.description: Discovery sign-off — the cell convenes in Tifa's bar.

avalanche.name: Reactor 1 Bombing
avalanche.description: Build kickoff: first sabotage strike on Sector 1 reactor.

avalanche.name: Pillar Defense
avalanche.description: Mid-project gate: holding the Sector 7 pillar against Shinra reprisal.

avalanche.name: Don Corneo Intelligence Drop
avalanche.description: Phase invoice trigger: Wall Market intel exchanged for funding.

avalanche.name: Cell Hand-off
avalanche.description: Hyper-care close: leadership passes from Barret to Tifa.

shinra-electric-power.name: Board Approval — Floor 70
shinra-electric-power.description: Project kickoff: the board signs off on the Mako platform rollout.

shinra-electric-power.name: Reactor 5 Online
shinra-electric-power.description: Build phase: fifth reactor brought to full mako output.

shinra-electric-power.name: Quarterly Earnings Review
shinra-electric-power.description: UAT gate: Rufus reviews dashboards before public release.

shinra-electric-power.name: Junon Cannon Demonstration
shinra-electric-power.description: Go-Live: the Sister Ray demo for shareholders and media.

shinra-electric-power.name: Sector Restoration Handoff
shinra-electric-power.description: Hyper-care close: Reeve assumes ongoing operations.

shinra-electric-power.name: Year-End Invoice
shinra-electric-power.description: Final invoice: the corporation closes its books on the engagement.

the-turks-soldier.name: Operative Briefing
the-turks-soldier.description: Discovery: Tseng issues the mission dossier.

the-turks-soldier.name: Forge the SOLDIER Loadout
the-turks-soldier.description: Build: materia, weapons, and comms kit assembled.

the-turks-soldier.name: Nibelheim Containment Audit
the-turks-soldier.description: Mission review: classified incident report goes upstairs.

the-turks-soldier.name: Helicopter Strike Live
the-turks-soldier.description: Go-Live: Reno and Rude execute the operation as designed.

the-turks-soldier.name: After-Action Hand-off
the-turks-soldier.description: Project close: Elena assumes archival duty.

the-turks-soldier.name: Departmental Reckoning
the-turks-soldier.description: Final invoice from the Department of Administrative Research.

cetra-meteor-orbit.name: Read the Cetra Tablets
cetra-meteor-orbit.description: Discovery: lore extracted from the Forgotten Capital.

cetra-meteor-orbit.name: Weave the Holy Prayer
cetra-meteor-orbit.description: Build: Holy materia activation routine assembled.

cetra-meteor-orbit.name: Lifestream Acceptance Test
cetra-meteor-orbit.description: UAT acceptance: the planet itself signs off.

cetra-meteor-orbit.name: Meteor Diverted
cetra-meteor-orbit.description: Go-Live + handoff: Holy meets Meteor over Midgar.

cetra-meteor-orbit.name: Final Recompense
cetra-meteor-orbit.description: Final invoice from the Cetra Heritage Watch.

Cloud Strife.notes: Mako poisoning recovery — bedrest at Mideel.

Tifa Lockhart.notes: Reopening Seventh Heaven — inventory and clean-up.

Barret Wallace.notes: Visit to Marlene at Kalm — overdue father-daughter time.

Aerith Gainsborough.notes: Tending the church flowers in Sector 5.

Red XIII Nanaki.notes: Cosmo Canyon — quarterly visit to Bugenhagen's grave.

Yuffie Kisaragi.notes: Wutai pilgrimage — recovering stolen materia for her father.

Vincent Valentine.notes: Coffin sleep cycle — Shinra Mansion basement.

Cid Highwind.notes: Highwind annual maintenance — engine overhaul at Rocket Town.

Rufus Shinra.notes: Costa del Sol board retreat — golf and strategy.

Reeve Tuesti.notes: Urban Development site visit — Sector 6 redevelopment plan.

Hojo.notes: Specimen research — fieldwork at the Northern Crater.

Tseng.notes: Junon liaison — quarterly President's detail rotation.

Reno.notes: Healin Lodge convalescence — post-mission injury leave.

Zack Fair.notes: Gongaga visit — checking on his parents.

Bugenhagen.notes: Cosmo Candle ceremony — annual stargazing observance.
